name: Terminal Agent Runner
description: Spawns terminal agent CLIs as a local provider. This fork targets claude code, opencode, codex cli, amux and currently defaults to Claude-compatible streaming.

agentBin.description: Path to the terminal agent binary

port.description: Port for the local bridge server

maxTurns.description: Max agentic turns per request (safety cap, default: 30)

workDir.description: Working directory for the terminal agent CLI
